title: Custom Hearts
description: This datapack adds 10 custom hearts with custom abilities and powers!
body:
# Custom Hearts

![BANNER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WI8INfRI/images/dc7bee917c9a6a7760f18960915f24cbd3522187.png)

![INFO](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/863313318806552586/1035847584415227994/PM-banners-info.png)

This datapack adds 10 new CUSTOM HEARTS, that have special abilities and powers.

To unlock these hearts, you must do different quests!

Quests are shown on the top of the screen, you must complete them!

### **Do '/reload' when you join the game!**

[Download on PMC](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/minecraft-but-there-are-custom-hearts/)


![FAQ](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/863313318806552586/1035847587061825576/PM-banners-faq.png)

**How many hearts does it add?** -> This datapack adds 10 new custom hearts; with custom powers and abilities.

**Java or Bedrock?** -> JAVA

**VERSION?** -> 1.19.2

**How do i get the hearts?** -> You complete quests, these are shown in the bossbar on the top of the screen

![REQUIREMENTS Version: 1.19.2, Optifine: Not Required, Resource Pack: required](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/902472323716775956/1047940692552454144/unknown.png)

Do **/reload** when you join to the world, to start the datapack!

[![PATREON](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/863313318806552586/1035847585937752094/PM-banners-supportPatreon.png)](https://www.patreon.com/diamond_dp/)

Have any questions, join my Discord server: https://discord.com/invite/xRVzmSnHdd

Subscribe me on YouTube : https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCSM2hMUa1LdEPpw5FYwKAyw
